story.text:
# 🛠️ Dual-Agent Harness (v1.0)
**skill** · shared · knowledge

The canonical autoresearch loop (agentprivacy-dual-agent-harness · built 2026-06-10): Measure → Find (complement-pair finders in parallel) → Referee → Hunt → Assay (the held-out gate) → Critic. Complement-pair agents held apart by the Gap (non-collusion precondition I(Y_S;Y_M|X)=0); bounded edits accepted only on held-out improvement. Instances: shor_mage (#1 · ecdsa.fail) and myterms (#2 · the browser-extension pair).

## Edges in

- [[shor_mage (the go-kit)]] *implements* →
- [[myterms (MyTerms Alliance kit)]] *implements* →
- [[Overlap Note · Key-Forging × V6]] *relates_to* →
